---
title: "Slack Theme"
description: "Theme inspired by Slack for React Email."
---

## Installation

<CodeTabs>

<TabsList>
  <TabsTrigger value="cli">Command</TabsTrigger>
  <TabsTrigger value="manual">Manual</TabsTrigger>
</TabsList>
<TabsContent value="cli">

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add @emailcn/theme-slack
```

</TabsContent>

<TabsContent value="manual">

<Steps>

<Step>Install the following dependencies:</Step>

```bash
npm install react-email
```

<Step>Copy and paste the following code into your project.</Step>

<ComponentSource
  src="registry/themes/define.ts"
  title="components/emails/themes/define.ts"
/>

<ComponentSource
  src="registry/themes/slack.ts"
  title="components/emails/themes/slack.ts"
/>

<Step>Update the import paths to match your project setup.</Step>

</Steps>

</TabsContent>

</CodeTabs>

## Usage

```tsx
import { Tailwind } from "react-email";
import { slackTheme } from "@/components/emails/themes/slack";

<Tailwind config={slackTheme}>
  {/* Your email content */}
</Tailwind>;
```
